title: aragallus viscidus
intro: Aragallus viscidus, also known as Sticky Geranium or Stickystem, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its sticky stems and red flowers. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aragallus viscidus include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of arthritis, as well as supporting cardiovascular health and boosting the immune system. Aragallus viscidus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in topical applications, such as creams and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
